column1: # RAG is COMPUTED, never narrated. Each row maps an evidence signal to a RAG
# contribution; a workstream's RAG is the WORST contribution across all its
# objects' evidence (RED > AMBER > GREEN). Two hard floors are enforced in code
# and CANNOT be relaxed by a customer override: (1) no evidence at all for a
# workstream => AMBER (never GREEN); (2) any COULD_NOT_CHECK coverage => at least
# AMBER. A customer may only TIGHTEN (e.g. make GO_WITH_WARNINGS = RED) via
# Cell separator is TAB. Lines starting with # and blank lines are skipped.
